The '''Chosen One''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] cult leader operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]] two [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] [[Time/Legends|prior]] to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]], the "Chosen One" was the title of a leader of a band of [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]] operating on [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. When the Chosen One took the control, he saw the cult's terrorist activity increase twofold. The cult's work, carried out by the Chosen One's faithful and devout followers, ranged from [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] to mass murder. The Chosen One personally hired the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]] to eliminate [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] member and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]], also a native of Lannik.<ref name="EIIG" />
